name: Pasta e' Fagioli (Pasta & Bean Soup)
recipeIngredient: Noodles (Shell macaroni or other): as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large 10-quart pot over medium heat. Add ground beef and cook until it starts to brown.
2. Add onions, carrots, celery, and tomatoes to the pot. Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain and rinse the beans separately. Stir them into the pot along with the remaining ingredients: beef stock, oregano, pepper, Tabasco sauce, spaghetti sauce, and noodles.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook until celery and carrots are tender, about 45 minutes.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving. For smaller portions, simply halve the recipe for up to four servings.
